orgPolicy.title: Invite PEs Now Have Elevated Self-Service in Greenhouse
orgPolicy.summary: PEs can now create Evergreens & Confidential reqs directly in GH, and close/re-open reqs without submitting a ticket.
bullets: Create Evergreens & Confidential reqs directly in Greenhouse — no ticket needed
Close & Re-Open your reqs in Greenhouse — no ticket needed
EIB bulk req uploads still submitted via PHC ticket, but processed by HRIS Ops

tp.point: New GH self-service perms for PEs — fewer tickets needed

orgPolicy.title: Updated Relocation Document for California (Effective June 18)
orgPolicy.summary: New dropdown in offer details asking whether a relocating candidate is moving to California. Required to generate correct relocation documents per CA Bill 692.
bullets: Effective June 18: new dropdown appears when candidate opts into relocation
Select 'Yes' if relocating TO California, 'No' if not
Determines which relocation docs are generated — California has specific clawback language requirements
Impacts CX & Sales roles with relocation candidates
orgPolicy.source: Alli Belamide — #invite-team, June 18, 2026 / IOPE Newsletter June 22, 2026

tp.point: New CA relocation dropdown required — select correctly or wrong docs generate

orgPolicy.title: New Broker License Verbiage in Offer Letters (CX & Sales Roles)
orgPolicy.summary: Updated language for the broker license offer question — new verbiage now populates in offer letters when 'Yes' is selected.
bullets: Applies to CX & Sales roles only
Updated verbiage covers licensing requirement, 3-month timeline, and cost reimbursement
No action needed unless creating an offer — be aware of what will populate

tp.point: Broker license offer verbiage updated — new language auto-populates when 'Yes' selected

orgPolicy.title: Unhire Process Update: Recruiters No Longer Unhire Candidates Directly
orgPolicy.summary: Michelle Eakin's team now handles unhires. Recruiters still ping #invite_notifications as before.
bullets: Recruiters still initiate by pinging #invite_notifications
Michelle Eakin's team now owns the actual unhire action
No change to how recruiters kick off the request

tp.point: Unhire process simplified — still ping #invite_notifications, but you no longer action it

Fill in your agenda section before Wednesday PE meetings
